title: Fullmetal Alchemist
synopsis: Brothers search for redemption after a failed human transmutation shatters their bodies.

title: Hunter x Hunter
synopsis: Gon and Killua chase their dreams through a world of hunters, trials, and mysteries.

title: One Punch Man
synopsis: A bored hero named Saitama defeats every enemy with a single punch.

title: Chainsaw Man
synopsis: Denji makes a devil bargain and joins a public safety squad to hunt monsters.

title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
synopsis: Generations of the Joestar family battle supernatural foes with unique powers.

title: Bleach
synopsis: Ichigo gains Soul Reaper powers and defends the living world from Hollows.

title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
synopsis: A street kid fights to survive in a neon megacity fueled by cyberware.

title: Code Geass
synopsis: Exiled prince Lelouch leads a rebellion with a power that can command anyone.

title: Princess Mononoke
synopsis: A cursed warrior is caught between iron miners and the spirits of the forest.

title: Cowboy Bebop
synopsis: A crew of bounty hunters cruises the solar system chasing dangerous criminals.

title: Dandadan
synopsis: Two students collide with aliens and spirits in a kinetic, supernatural adventure.

title: Dragon Ball Z
synopsis: Goku and friends protect Earth from escalating cosmic threats.

title: Steins;Gate
synopsis: A quirky scientist discovers time travel and pays the price for changing fate.

title: Spy x Family
synopsis: A spy, assassin, and telepath form a fake family to stop a war.

title: Ghost in the Shell
synopsis: Major Kusanagi investigates cybercrime in a world where minds merge with machines.

title: Pokemon
synopsis: Ash and Pikachu journey the regions to become Pokemon Masters.

title: Mushoku Tensei
synopsis: A man reborn in a fantasy world seeks a better life while facing new dangers.

title: Mob Psycho 100
synopsis: A gentle psychic teen learns confidence and control of his overwhelming powers.

title: Tokyo Ghoul
synopsis: A college student becomes half-ghoul and is forced to survive among monsters.

title: Hellsing
synopsis: A powerful vampire battles supernatural threats for an elite organization.

title: Naruto
synopsis: A young ninja chases recognition while protecting his village.

title: Yu Yu Hakusho
synopsis: A teen spirit detective battles demons and rival fighters.

title: Neon Genesis Evangelion
synopsis: Pilots confront apocalyptic battles and personal trauma.

title: My Hero Academia
synopsis: A powerless teen trains to become a top hero in a superpowered society.

title: Sailor Moon
synopsis: Magical guardians defend love and justice across the galaxy.

title: Inuyasha
synopsis: A modern girl and a half-demon hunt shards of a mystical jewel.

title: Trigun
synopsis: A pacifist gunslinger navigates chaos on a desert planet.

title: Gundam Wing
synopsis: Five pilots fight interstellar politics with advanced mobile suits.

title: Samurai Champloo
synopsis: Three travelers mix hip-hop style with Edo-era swordplay.

title: Akira
synopsis: A biker in Neo-Tokyo faces psychic powers and government secrets.

title: Rurouni Kenshin
synopsis: A former assassin seeks redemption in the Meiji era.

title: Spirited Away
synopsis: A girl navigates a spirit world to save her parents.

title: Your Name
synopsis: Two teens swap bodies and race to alter a distant catastrophe.

title: Dragon Ball
synopsis: Goku searches for Dragon Balls and faces increasingly strong foes.

title: Haikyu!!
synopsis: A determined underdog turns a high school team into a contender.

title: Gintama
synopsis: A samurai odd-jobs crew balances absurd comedy with serious battles.

title: Violet Evergarden
synopsis: A former soldier writes letters to understand human emotions.

title: Fate/Zero
synopsis: Mages and heroic spirits clash in a brutal battle for the Holy Grail.

title: Monster
synopsis: A surgeon hunts the serial killer whose life he once saved.

title: Paranoia Agent
synopsis: A mysterious attacker triggers a citywide psychological spiral.

title: One Piece
synopsis: Monkey D. Luffy and his crew search for the ultimate treasure, the One Piece.

title: Death Note
synopsis: A high school student discovers a supernatural notebook that can kill anyone whose name is written in it.

title: Attack on Titan
synopsis: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid Titans behind massive walls.

title: Demon Slayer
synopsis: Tanjiro joins the Demon Slayer Corps to avenge his family and cure his sister.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
synopsis: A high school student joins a secret organization to fight deadly curses.

title: ODDTAXI
synopsis: A walrus taxi driver becomes entangled in a missing person case.

title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica
synopsis: A seemingly innocent magical girl story that subverts the genre with dark themes.
